message:
Last winter, we had a surprise snowstorm that knocked out our power for a couple of days. I was getting cozy with my family, playing board games by candlelight, when I suddenly realized my phone was dying. I had been using it to keep up with the weather updates and check in on friends. Talk about a panic moment! 

After a scramble to find a charger that wouldn't work without power, I remembered how important it is to have a backup plan. We ended up gathering all our flashlights and candles to make the best of it, but it definitely reminded me to have a battery-operated radio for future storms. 

Being prepared doesn't have to be overwhelming; sometimes, it just means thinking ahead a little. Have you had a tech hiccup during a storm? What’s your go-to backup plan?
